description: You are a Level Designer for a role-playing game. Create a 2D layout diagram for a new dungeon called 'The Sunken Crypt' based on the design specification provided at '~/Desktop/dungeon_design_spec.txt'. The diagram must represent the rooms, sizes, connections, and required contents (Keys, Bosses, Traps, etc.) as specified in the document. Label each room with its name and include markers for key elements: 'Start', 'Rusty Key', 'Trap', 'Loot', 'Boss', and 'Locked Door'. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/sunken_crypt.drawio' and export it as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/sunken_crypt.png'.
